---
title: "The Rev. Alexander Robert Charles Dallas"
---

## The Rev. Alexander Robert Charles Dallas

**Dates:** (1791-1869)

### Description

Rector of Wonston

### Biography

Evangelical, anti-Tractarian, he was manager of the Irish Church Missions to Roman Catholics and married secondly (1849) Ann Biscoe Tyndale (d.1877).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
